title: athyrium deltoidofrons var. multifidum
intro: Athyrium deltoidofrons var. multifidum, also known as multifidoid lady fern, is a variant of the Athyrium deltoidofrons species, a type of fern native to the Himalayas. The multifidoid lady fern is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory and digestive health. Herbal preparations of the multifidoid lady fern include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal remedies.
